records.chapter: Chapter on the Recommended and Praiseworthy Traits and Characteristics of Women
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.4364 - Imam (as) said: "If any of you intends to marry, let him inquire about her hair just as he inquires about her face, for hair is one of the two aspects of beauty."
records.arabicText: 4364 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِذَا أَرَادَ أَحَدُكُمْ أَنْ يَتَزَوَّجَ فَلْيَسْأَلْ عَنْ شَعْرِهَا كَمَا يَسْأَلُ عَنْ وَجْهِهَا فَإِنَّ اَلشَّعْرَ أَحَدُ اَلْجَمَالَيْنِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4364 - Imam (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "If any of you intends to marry, let him inquire about her hair just as he inquires about her face, for hair is one of the two aspects of beauty."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Recommended and Praiseworthy Traits and Characteristics of Women
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.4365 - Imam (as) said: "The best of your women is the one who has a pleasant fragrance and prepares good food, who spends appropriately if she spends, and who withholds appropriately if she withholds. Such a woman is among the workers of Allah (swt), and the worker of Allah (swt) will never fail."
records.arabicText: 4365 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "خَيْرُ نِسَائِكُمُ اَلطَّيِّبَةُ اَلرِّيحِ اَلطَّيِّبَةُ اَلطَّعَامِ ، اَلَّتِي إِنْ أَنْفَقَتْ أَنْفَقَتْ بِمَعْرُوفٍ وَ إِنْ أَمْسَكَتْ أَمْسَكَتْ بِمَعْرُوفٍ فَتِلْكَ مِنْ عُمَّالِ اَللَّهِ وَ عَامِلُ اَللَّهِ لاَ يَخِيبُ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4365 - Imam (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The best of your women is the one who has a pleasant fragrance and prepares good food, who spends appropriately if she spends, and who withholds appropriately if she withholds. Such a woman is among the workers of Allah (swt), and the worker of Allah (swt) will never fail."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Recommended and Praiseworthy Traits and Characteristics of Women
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.4366 - Jamil ibn Darraj narrated from Abu Abdillah (as) who said: "The best of your women is the one who, if she becomes angry or causes her husband to become angry, says to him, 'My hand is in your hand, and I will not rest until you are pleased with me.'"
records.arabicText: 4366 - وَ رَوَى جَمِيلُ بْنُ دَرَّاجٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "خَيْرُ نِسَائِكُمُ اَلَّتِي إِنْ غَضِبَتْ أَوْ أَغْضَبَتْ قَالَتْ لِزَوْجِهَا يَدِي فِي يَدِكَ لاَ أَكْتَحِلُ بِغُمْضٍ حَتَّى تَرْضَى عَنِّي".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4366 - Jamil ibn Darraj narrated from Abu Abdillah (as) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The best of your women is the one who, if she becomes angry or causes her husband to become angry, says to him, 'My hand is in your hand, and I will not rest until you are pleased with me.'"

records.chapter: Chapter on the Recommended and Praiseworthy Traits and Characteristics of Women
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.4367 - Ali ibn Ri'ab narrated from Abu Hamzah al-Thumali, from Jabir ibn Abdullah al-Ansari, who said:
We were sitting with the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) when we began discussing women and the virtues of some over others.
The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said: "Shall I not inform you of the best of your women?"
They said: "Yes, O Messenger of Allah (swt), tell us."
He (sw) said: "The best of your women is the one who is loving and fertile, modest and chaste, honorable among her family, humble with her husband, displaying her beauty to her husband while guarding herself from others. She listens to his words, obeys his commands, and when he is alone with her, she offers him what he desires, without imitating the mannerisms of men."
records.arabicText: 4367 - وَ رَوَى عَلِيُّ بْنُ رِئَابٍ عَنْ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ اَلثُّمَالِيِّ عَنْ جَابِرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ اَلْأَنْصَارِيِّ قَالَ: كُنَّا جُلُوساً مَعَ رَسُولِ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ قَالَ فَتَذَاكَرْنَا اَلنِّسَاءَ وَ فَضْلَ بَعْضِهِنَّ عَلَى بَعْضٍ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ "أَ لاَ أُخْبِرُكُمْ بِخَيْرِ نِسَائِكُمْ" قَالُوا بَلَى يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ فَأَخْبِرْنَا قَالَ "إِنَّ مِنْ خَيْرِ نِسَائِكُمُ اَلْوَلُودَ اَلْوَدُودَ اَلسَّتِيرَةَ اَلْعَفِيفَةَ اَلْعَزِيزَةَ فِي أَهْلِهَا اَلذَّلِيلَةَ مَعَ بَعْلِهَا اَلْمُتَبَرِّجَةَ مَعَ زَوْجِهَا اَلْحَصَانَ مَعَ غَيْرِهِ اَلَّتِي تَسْمَعُ قَوْلَهُ وَ تُطِيعُ أَمْرَهُ وَ إِذَا خَلاَ بِهَا بَذَلَتْ لَهُ مَا أَرَادَ مِنْهَا وَ لَمْ تَبَذَّلْ لَهُ تَبَذُّلَ اَلرَّجُلِ ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4367 - Ali ibn Ri'ab narrated from Abu Hamzah al-Thumali, from Jabir ibn Abdullah al-Ansari, who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
We were sitting with the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) when we began discussing women and the virtues of some over others.
The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said: "Shall I not inform you of the best of your women?"
They said: "Yes, O Messenger of Allah (swt), tell us."
He (sw) said: "The best of your women is the one who is loving and fertile, modest and chaste, honorable among her family, humble with her husband, displaying her beauty to her husband while guarding herself from others. She listens to his words, obeys his commands, and when he is alone with her, she offers him what he desires, without imitating the mannerisms of men."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Recommended and Praiseworthy Traits and Characteristics of Women
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.4368 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said: "A Muslim man does not gain a better benefit after Islam than a Muslim wife who pleases him when he looks at her, obeys him when he commands her, and safeguards herself and his wealth in his absence."
records.arabicText: 4368 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "مَا اِسْتَفَادَ اِمْرُؤٌ مُسْلِمٌ فَائِدَةً بَعْدَ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ أَفْضَلَ مِنْ زَوْجَةٍ مُسْلِمَةٍ تَسُرُّهُ إِذَا نَظَرَ إِلَيْهَا وَ تُطِيعُهُ إِذَا أَمَرَهَا وَ تَحْفَظُهُ إِذَا غَابَ عَنْهَا فِي نَفْسِهَا وَ مَالِهِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4368 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "A Muslim man does not gain a better benefit after Islam than a Muslim wife who pleases him when he looks at her, obeys him when he commands her, and safeguards herself and his wealth in his absence."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Recommended and Praiseworthy Traits and Characteristics of Women
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.4369 - A man came to the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) and said: "I have a wife who, when I enter the house, welcomes me, and when I leave, bids me farewell. If she sees me worried, she says, 'What is troubling you? If you are concerned about your sustenance, know that someone else has taken responsibility for it. And if you are concerned about your afterlife, then may Allah (swt) increase your concern.'"
The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said: "Indeed, Allah (swt) has workers, and she is one of His (swt) workers. She will have half the reward of a martyr."
records.arabicText: 4369 - : وَ جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى رَسُولِ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ فَقَالَ إِنَّ لِي زَوْجَةً إِذَا دَخَلْتُ تَلَقَّتْنِي وَ إِذَا خَرَجْتُ شَيَّعَتْنِي وَ إِذَا رَأَتْنِي مَهْمُوماً قَالَتْ مَا يُهِمُّكَ إِنْ كُنْتَ تَهْتَمُّ لِرِزْقِكَ فَقَدْ تَكَفَّلَ لَكَ بِهِ غَيْرُكَ وَ إِنْ كُنْتَ تَهْتَمُّ بِأَمْرِ آخِرَتِكَ فَزَادَكَ اَللَّهُ هَمّاً فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ "إِنَّ لِلَّهِ عُمَّالاً وَ هَذِهِ مِنْ عُمَّالِهِ لَهَا نِصْفُ أَجْرِ اَلشَّهِيدِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4369 - A man came to the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) and said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"I have a wife who, when I enter the house, welcomes me, and when I leave, bids me farewell. If she sees me worried, she says, 'What is troubling you? If you are concerned about your sustenance, know that someone else has taken responsibility for it. And if you are concerned about your afterlife, then may Allah (swt) increase your concern.'"
The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said: "Indeed, Allah (swt) has workers, and she is one of His (swt) workers. She will have half the reward of a martyr."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Blameworthy Traits and Characteristics of Women
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.4370 - It is narrated from Abdullah ibn Sinan, from Abu Abdillah (as), who said:
"The most overpowering enemy of a believer is a bad wife."
records.arabicText: 4370 - رُوِيَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "أَغْلَبُ اَلْأَعْدَاءِ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ زَوْجَةُ اَلسَّوْءِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4370 - It is narrated from Abdullah ibn Sinan, from Abu Abdillah (as), who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "The most overpowering enemy of a believer is a bad wife."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Blameworthy Traits and Characteristics of Women
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.4371 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"I have not seen those who are weak in faith and deficient in intellect more capable of overwhelming a man of reason than you (women)."
records.arabicText: 4371 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "مَا رَأَيْتُ ضَعِيفَاتِ اَلدِّينِ نَاقِصَاتِ اَلْعُقُولِ أَسْلَبَ لِذِي لُبٍّ مِنْكُنَّ ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4371 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "I have not seen those who are weak in faith and deficient in intellect more capable of overwhelming a man of reason than you (women)."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Blameworthy Traits and Characteristics of Women
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.4372 - Imam (as) said:
"Indeed, women are a source of dependence and vulnerability. So, conceal their vulnerability within the homes and cover their dependence with silence."
records.arabicText: 4372 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِنَّمَا اَلنِّسَاءُ عِيٌّ وَ عَوْرَةٌ فَاسْتُرُوا اَلْعَوْرَةَ بِالْبُيُوتِ وَ اُسْتُرُوا اَلْعِيَّ بِالسُّكُوتِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4372 - Imam (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Indeed, women are a source of dependence and vulnerability. So, conceal their vulnerability within the homes and cover their dependence with silence."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Blameworthy Traits and Characteristics of Women
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.4373 - Imam (as) said: "If it were not for women, Allah (swt) would have been truly worshiped as He (swt) deserves to be worshiped."
records.arabicText: 4373 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "لَوْ لاَ اَلنِّسَاءُ لَعُبِدَ اَللَّهُ حَقّاً حَقّاً".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4373 - Imam (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "If it were not for women, Allah (swt) would have been truly worshiped as He (swt) deserves to be worshiped."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Blameworthy Traits and Characteristics of Women
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.4374 - Al-Asbagh ibn Nubatah narrated from Commander of the Faithful (as) that he said:
"I heard him say: In the last days and near the Hour, when it will be the worst of times, there will appear women who are uncovered, naked, and flaunting themselves.
They will outwardly belong to the religion but will be immersed in trials, inclined toward desires, hastening toward pleasures, and making permissible what is forbidden. They will dwell in Hell forever."
records.arabicText: 4374 - وَ رَوَى اَلْأَصْبَغُ بْنُ نُبَاتَةَ عَنْ أَمِيرِ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ: "يَظْهَرُ فِي آخِرِ اَلزَّمَانِ وَ اِقْتِرَابِ اَلسَّاعَةِ وَ هُوَ شَرُّ اَلْأَزْمِنَةِ نِسْوَةٌ كَاشِفَاتٌ عَارِيَاتٌ مُتَبَرِّجَاتٌ مِنَ اَلدِّينِ دَاخِلاَتٌ فِي اَلْفِتَنِ مَائِلاَتٌ إِلَى اَلشَّهَوَاتِ مُسْرِعَاتٌ إِلَى اَللَّذَّاتِ مُسْتَحِلاَّتٌ لِلْمُحَرَّمَاتِ فِي جَهَنَّمَ خَالِدَاتٌ ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4374 - Al-Asbagh ibn Nubatah narrated from Commander of the Faithful (as) that he said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"I heard him say: In the last days and near the Hour, when it will be the worst of times, there will appear women who are uncovered, naked, and flaunting themselves.
They will outwardly belong to the religion but will be immersed in trials, inclined toward desires, hastening toward pleasures, and making permissible what is forbidden. They will dwell in Hell forever."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Blameworthy Traits and Characteristics of Women
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.4375 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) passed by a group of women, stopped, and said:
"O assembly of women! I have not seen those who are deficient in intellect and religion more capable of taking away the reasoning of men of understanding than you. Indeed, I have observed that you will form the majority of the inhabitants of Hell on the Day of Judgment. So, seek closeness to Allah (swt), the Almighty and Glorious, as much as you can."
One of the women asked: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), what is the deficiency in our religion and intellect?"
He (sw) replied: "As for the deficiency in your religion, it is due to the menstruation that afflicts you, during which one of you may remain for a period, as Allah (swt) wills, without praying or fasting. And as for the deficiency in your intellect, it is because the testimony of a woman is equivalent to half the testimony of a man."
records.arabicText:
4375 - : وَ مَرَّ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ عَلَى نِسْوَةٍ فَوَقَفَ عَلَيْهِنَّ ثُمَّ قَالَ
"يَا مَعَاشِرَ اَلنِّسَاءِ مَا رَأَيْتُ نَوَاقِصَ عُقُولٍ وَ دِينٍ أَذْهَبَ بِعُقُولِ ذَوِي اَلْأَلْبَابِ مِنْكُنَّ إِنِّي قَدْ رَأَيْتُ أَنَّكُنَّ أَكْثَرُ أَهْلِ اَلنَّارِ ، يَوْمَ اَلْقِيَامَةِ فَتَقَرَّبْنَ إِلَى اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مَا اِسْتَطَعْتُنَّ"
فَقَالَتِ اِمْرَأَةٌ مِنْهُنَّ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ مَا نُقْصَانُ دِينِنَا وَ عُقُولِنَا فَقَالَ "أَمَّا نُقْصَانُ دِينِكُنَّ فَالْحَيْضُ اَلَّذِي يُصِيبُكُنَّ فَتَمْكُثُ إِحْدَاكُنَّ مَا شَاءَ اَللَّهُ لاَ تُصَلِّي وَ لاَ تَصُومُ وَ أَمَّا نُقْصَانُ عُقُولِكُنَّ فَشَهَادَتُكُنَّ إِنَّمَا شَهَادَةُ اَلْمَرْأَةِ نِصْفُ شَهَادَةِ اَلرَّجُلِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4375 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) passed by a group of women, stopped, and said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"O assembly of women! I have not seen those who are deficient in intellect and religion more capable of taking away the reasoning of men of understanding than you. Indeed, I have observed that you will form the majority of the inhabitants of Hell on the Day of Judgment. So, seek closeness to Allah (swt), the Almighty and Glorious, as much as you can."
One of the women asked: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), what is the deficiency in our religion and intellect?"
He (sw) replied: "As for the deficiency in your religion, it is due to the menstruation that afflicts you, during which one of you may remain for a period, as Allah (swt) wills, without praying or fasting. And as for the deficiency in your intellect, it is because the testimony of a woman is equivalent to half the testimony of a man."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Blameworthy Traits and Characteristics of Women
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.4376 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said: "Shall I not inform you about the worst of your women?"
They said: "Yes, O Messenger of Allah (swt), tell us."
He said: "The worst of your women is the one who is humble and submissive with her family but domineering and arrogant with her husband. She is barren, spiteful, and does not refrain from committing indecency. She flaunts herself when her husband is absent but is reserved and guarded when he is present. She does not listen to his words nor obey his commands. When he is alone with her, she behaves stubbornly like a difficult mount that resists being ridden. She neither accepts his apology nor forgives his faults."
records.arabicText: 4376 - : وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ "أَ لاَ أُخْبِرُكُمْ بِشَرِّ نِسَائِكُمْ" قَالُوا بَلَى يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ فَأَخْبِرْنَا قَالَ "مِنْ شَرِّ نِسَائِكُمُ اَلذَّلِيلَةُ فِي أَهْلِهَا اَلْعَزِيزَةُ مَعَ بَعْلِهَا اَلْعَقِيمُ اَلْحَقُودُ اَلَّتِي لاَ تَتَوَرَّعُ عَنْ قَبِيحٍ اَلْمُتَبَرِّجَةُ إِذَا غَابَ عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا اَلْحَصَانُ مَعَهُ إِذَا حَضَرَ اَلَّتِي لاَ تَسْمَعُ قَوْلَهُ وَ لاَ تُطِيعُ أَمْرَهُ فَإِذَا خَلاَ بِهَا تَمَنَّعَتْ تَمَنُّعَ اَلصَّعْبَةِ عِنْدَ رُكُوبِهَا وَ لاَ تَقْبَلُ لَهُ عُذْراً وَ لاَ تَغْفِرُ لَهُ ذَنْباً".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4376 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"Shall I not inform you about the worst of your women?"
They said: "Yes, O Messenger of Allah (swt), tell us."
He said: "The worst of your women is the one who is humble and submissive with her family but domineering and arrogant with her husband. She is barren, spiteful, and does not refrain from committing indecency. She flaunts herself when her husband is absent but is reserved and guarded when he is present. She does not listen to his words nor obey his commands. When he is alone with her, she behaves stubbornly like a difficult mount that resists being ridden. She neither accepts his apology nor forgives his faults."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Blameworthy Traits and Characteristics of Women
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.4377 - The Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) stood up to deliver a sermon and said: "O people, beware of the green growth in a dung heap."
It was asked: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), what is the green growth in a dung heap?"
He (sw) replied: "A beautiful woman raised in a bad environment."
records.arabicText: 4377 - : وَ قَامَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ خَطِيباً فَقَالَ "أَيُّهَا اَلنَّاسُ إِيَّاكُمْ وَ خَضْرَاءَ اَلدِّمَنِ " قِيلَ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ وَ مَا خَضْرَاءُ اَلدِّمَنِ قَالَ "اَلْمَرْأَةُ اَلْحَسْنَاءُ فِي مَنْبِتِ اَلسَّوْءِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4377 - The Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) stood up to deliver a sermon and said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"O people, beware of the green growth in a dung heap."
It was asked: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), what is the green growth in a dung heap?"
He (sw) replied: "A beautiful woman raised in a bad environment."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Blameworthy Traits and Characteristics of Women
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.4378 - Imam (as) said: "Know that a dark-skinned woman who bears many children is more beloved to me than a beautiful woman who is barren."
records.arabicText: 4378 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "اِعْلَمُوا أَنَّ اَلْمَرْأَةَ اَلسَّوْدَاءَ إِذَا كَانَتْ وَلُوداً أَحَبُّ إِلَيَّ مِنَ اَلْحَسْنَاءِ اَلْعَاقِرِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4378 - Imam (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Know that a dark-skinned woman who bears many children is more beloved to me than a beautiful woman who is barren."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Admonition Regarding Women
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.4379 - Sama'ah narrated from Abu Abdillah (as) who said: "Fear Allah (swt) regarding the two weak ones."
records.arabicText: 4379 - رَوَى سَمَاعَةُ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "اِتَّقُوا اَللَّهَ فِي اَلضَّعِيفَيْنِ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4379 - Sama'ah narrated from Abu Abdillah (as) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Fear Allah (swt) regarding the two weak ones."

records.chapter: Chapter on Marrying a Woman for Her Wealth, Beauty, or Religion
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.4380 - Hisham ibn al-Hakam narrated from Abu Abdillah (as) who said: "If a man marries a woman for her wealth or her beauty, he will not be granted that. But if he marries her for her religion, Allah (swt), the Almighty and Glorious, will grant him her beauty and her wealth."
records.arabicText: 4380 - رَوَى هِشَامُ بْنُ اَلْحَكَمِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ اَلرَّجُلُ اَلْمَرْأَةَ لِمَالِهَا أَوْ جَمَالِهَا لَمْ يُرْزَقْ ذَلِكَ فَإِنْ تَزَوَّجَهَا لِدِينِهَا رَزَقَهُ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ جَمَالَهَا وَ مَالَهَا ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4380 - Hisham ibn al-Hakam narrated from Abu Abdillah (as) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "If a man marries a woman for her wealth or her beauty, he will not be granted that. But if he marries her for her religion, Allah (swt), the Almighty and Glorious, will grant him her beauty and her wealth."

records.chapter: Chapter on Compatibility in Marriage
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.4381 - Muhammad ibn al-Walid narrated from al-Husayn ibn Bashshar, who said:
I wrote to Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) concerning a man who proposed marriage to someone.
Imam (as) replied: "If someone proposes to you, and you are satisfied with his religion and trustworthiness, then marry him, whoever he may be. If you do not do so, there will be 'fitnah (discord) on the earth and great corruption.'"
records.arabicText: 4381 - رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ اَلْوَلِيدِ عَنِ اَلْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ بَشَّارٍ قَالَ: كَتَبْتُ إِلَى أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فِي رَجُلٍ خَطَبَ إِلَيَّ فَكَتَبَ "مَنْ خَطَبَ إِلَيْكُمْ فَرَضِيتُمْ دِينَهُ وَ أَمَانَتَهُ كَائِناً مَنْ كَانَ فَزَوِّجُوهُ وَ إِلاَّ تَفْعَلُوا "تَكُنْ فِتْنَةٌ فِي اَلْأَرْضِ وَ فَسٰادٌ كَبِيرٌ" ".
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.4381 - Muhammad ibn al-Walid narrated from al-Husayn ibn Bashshar, who said:
I wrote to Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) concerning a man who proposed marriage to someone.
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam (as) replied: "If someone proposes to you, and you are satisfied with his religion and trustworthiness, then marry him, whoever he may be. If you do not do so, there will be 'fitnah (discord) on the earth and great corruption.'"

records.chapter: Chapter on Compatibility in Marriage
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.4382 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"I am only a human being like you; I marry amongst you and I arrange marriages for you.
Except for Sayyida Fatimah {s.a}, for her marriage was decreed from the heavens."
records.arabicText: 4382 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : " "إِنَّمٰا أَنَا بَشَرٌ مِثْلُكُمْ" أَتَزَوَّجُ فِيكُمْ وَ أُزَوِّجُكُمْ إِلاَّ فَاطِمَةَ فَإِنَّ تَزْوِيجَهَا نَزَلَ مِنَ اَلسَّمَاءِ ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4382 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"I am only a human being like you; I marry amongst you and I arrange marriages for you.
Except for Sayyida Fatimah {s.a}, for her marriage was decreed from the heavens."

records.chapter: Chapter on Compatibility in Marriage
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.4383 - Imam (as) said: "Had Allah (swt), the Exalted, not created Sayyida Fatimah {s.a} for Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as), there would not have been any equal for her on the face of the earth, from Adam to those after him."
records.arabicText: 4383 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "لَوْ لاَ أَنَّ اَللَّهَ تَعَالَى خَلَقَ فَاطِمَةَ لِعَلِيٍّ مَا كَانَ لَهَا عَلَى وَجْهِ اَلْأَرْضِ كُفْوٌ آدَمُ فَمَنْ دُونَهُ".

records.chapter: Chapter on Compatibility in Marriage
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.4384 - The Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) looked at the children of Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) and Ja'far (as), peace be upon them, and said:
"Our daughters are for our sons, and our sons are for our daughters."
records.arabicText: 4384 - : وَ نَظَرَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ إِلَى أَوْلاَدِ عَلِيٍّ وَ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فَقَالَ "بَنَاتُنَا لِبَنِينَا وَ بَنُونَا لِبَنَاتِنَا ".

records.chapter: Chapter on Compatibility in Marriage
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.4385 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "
Believers are equals to one another."
records.arabicText: 4385 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : " اَلْمُؤْمِنُونَ بَعْضُهُمْ أَكْفَاءُ بَعْضٍ ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4385 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "
records.thaqalaynMatn: Believers are equals to one another."

records.chapter: Chapter on Compatibility in Marriage
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.4386 - Imam (as) said: "A suitable match is one who is chaste and possesses financial means."
records.arabicText: 4386 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "اَلْكُفْؤُ أَنْ يَكُونَ عَفِيفاً وَ عِنْدَهُ يَسَارٌ".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4386 - Imam (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "A suitable match is one who is chaste and possesses financial means."

records.chapter: Chapter on the Recommended Supplications and Prayers for One Who Intends to Marry
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.4387 - Muthanna ibn al-Walid al-Hannat narrated from Abu Basir, who said:
Abu Abdillah (as) said to me: "When one of you intends to get married, what should he do?"
I replied: "I do not know, may I be your ransom."
Imam (as) said: "When he makes up his mind for that, let him perform two units of prayer, praise Allah (swt), the Almighty and Glorious, and say:
'O Allah (swt), I intend marriage, so decree for me from among the women the one who is most chaste in her private parts, best in preserving herself for me, my wealth, and the most abundant in sustenance, and the greatest in blessings. Grant me from her a good offspring whom You (swt) make for me a righteous successor during my life and after my death.'"
records.arabicText: 4387 - رَوَى مُثَنَّى بْنُ اَلْوَلِيدِ اَلْحَنَّاطُ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ قَالَ لِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ أَحَدُكُمْ كَيْفَ يَصْنَعُ" قُلْتُ مَا أَدْرِي جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ قَالَ "إِذَا هَمَّ بِذَلِكَ فَلْيُصَلِّ رَكْعَتَيْنِ وَ يَحْمَدُ اَللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ يَقُولُ: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أُرِيدُ اَلتَّزْوِيجَ فَقَدِّرْ لِي مِنَ اَلنِّسَاءِ أَعَفَّهُنَّ فَرْجاً وَ أَحْفَظَهُنَّ لِي فِي نَفْسِهَا وَ مَالِي وَ أَوْسَعَهُنَّ رِزْقاً وَ أَعْظَمَهُنَّ بَرَكَةً وَ قَيِّضْ لِي مِنْهَا وَلَداً طَيِّباً تَجْعَلُهُ لِي خَلَفاً صَالِحاً فِي حَيَاتِي وَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِي".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4387 - Muthanna ibn al-Walid al-Hannat narrated from Abu Basir, who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
Abu Abdillah (as) said to me: "When one of you intends to get married, what should he do?"
I replied: "I do not know, may I be your ransom."
Imam (as) said: "When he makes up his mind for that, let him perform two units of prayer, praise Allah (swt), the Almighty and Glorious, and say:
'O Allah (swt), I intend marriage, so decree for me from among the women the one who is most chaste in her private parts, best in preserving herself for me, my wealth, and the most abundant in sustenance, and the greatest in blessings. Grant me from her a good offspring whom You (swt) make for me a righteous successor during my life and after my death.'"

records.chapter: Chapter on the Time When Marriage is Disliked
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.4388 - Muhammad ibn Humran narrated from his father, who reported from Abu Abdillah (as) that he said: "Whoever marries when the moon is in a harmful or unfavorable position will not see good outcomes."
records.arabicText: 4388 - رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حُمْرَانَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "مَنْ تَزَوَّجَ وَ اَلْقَمَرُ فِي اَلْعَقْرَبِ لَمْ يَرَ اَلْحُسْنَى".
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.4388 - Muhammad ibn Humran narrated from his father, who reported from Abu Abdillah (as) that he said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Whoever marries when the moon is in a harmful or unfavorable position will not see good outcomes."
